_comment: Every file in this list is permitted to use raw SQL ($executeRaw, $queryRaw,
$executeRawUnsafe, $queryRawUnsafe). All other files are blocked by the
1. Add the file path (relative to repo root) with a reason
2. The reason must explain WHY raw SQL is necessary
3. Get explicit review approval — raw SQL bypasses RLS
4. Prefer tagged templates ($queryRaw`...`) over Unsafe variants
rls-infrastructure  — Core RLS context-setting (SET LOCAL / set_config)
select-for-update   — Row-level locking within an RLS transaction
aggregate-query     — Complex aggregation on materialized views with tenant filter
sequence-lock       — Sequence number generation with FOR UPDATE lock
test-setup          — E2E/integration test setup and teardown

allowlist.reason: Core RLS context-setting: SET LOCAL app.current_tenant_id, app.current_user_id, app.current_role
Worker RLS context-setting via set_config() — tagged template, not Unsafe
Bootstrap assertion querying pg_roles to verify DB role lacks SUPERUSER/BYPASSRLS
PostgreSQL liveness check (SELECT 1), not tenant-scoped
Worker PostgreSQL liveness check (SELECT 1), not tenant-scoped
SELECT FOR UPDATE lock on behaviour_award_types within TenantAwareJob transaction for dedup serialization (DZ-24)
Partition DDL (CREATE TABLE PARTITION OF). Table names from constants, not user input. Input-validated with SAFE_IDENTIFIER_RE and SAFE_DATE_RE.
